The Defendant's: Exhibits In Support of  Motion to Vacate Conviction Under Cal PC 1473.7
The Defendant's: Notice of Motion and Motion to Vacate Conviction Under Cal PC 1473.7; Memorandum of Points and Authorities Conv Date: 12/24/2018
DEFT REQUEST TO CONVERT ADULT PROBATION TERM TO COURT PROBATION FILED
DEF REQ ATC MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION, FILED
DEF MOT TO MODIFY STAY AWAY ORDER FILED
DA MOT TO CONT JURY TRIAL FILED

/CAL SENTENCING/TWS/CCC COUNTS 3 AND 4/CH3 ISS PROB 2 Y PJ 8D/CTS 4/4019HALF/SATERM/X:THE DEFENDANT MUST NOT HARASS JARED ROBERT CLARK AS SPECIFIEDIN THE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER SIGNED, FILED AND SERVED IN COURT TODAY,//X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE 26 SESSIONS OF BEHAVIORAL COUNSELING THROUGH THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT, WITH CREDIT FOR COMPLETING 5 OF THE 26 COUNSELING SESSIONS TO DATE,/X:UPON COMPLETION OF COUNSELING THE DEFENDANT MAY PETITION TO CONVERT FORMAL PROBATION TO INFORMAL COURT PROBATION,/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL MOTION TO MODIFY CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER/X JARED ROBERT CLARK, PROECTED PERSON, IS SWORN AND REQUESTS A MODIFICATION OF THE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER WHICH IS GRANTED BY THE COURT,/X:THE MOTION IS GRANTED,/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNTS 3 AND 4, PC 242, BOTH A MISDEMEANOR,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3 AND 4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/

/CAL: TRIAL READINESS CONFERENCE/X: THIS PROCEEDING IS NOT REPORTED,/NP/X: THE CASE HAS BEEN PRE-TRIED AND THE 12-10-18 TRIAL DATE IN DEPT, 17 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/ACM/LDTR:12-20-18/SA1:JARED R CLARK/SA2:626 CHURCH ST, #1, SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:MSC/DOP/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/
